title: GitHub Trigger node returns undefined httpCode error
symptom: When trying to activate the GitHub trigger workflow, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'httpCode')'. This prevents the workflow from executing.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or integration
root_cause: The error indicates that the GitHub trigger node is unable to properly handle the response from GitHub, likely due to a misconfiguration in the webhook or the GitHub API not returning the expected data structure.
fix_steps: Verify that the webhook URL in GitHub matches the Test URL provided by the GitHub trigger node in n8n.
Check that the access token has the necessary permissions to access the repository and events.
Ensure that the repository owner and name are correctly specified in the node settings.
agent_instruction: Check the webhook URL and access token permissions for the GitHub trigger node.
